Name: UCapsuleComponent
Description: A capsule generally used for simple collision. Bounds are rendered as lines in the editor.

Variables.Name: CapsuleHalfHeight
Variables.Description:
Half-height, from center of capsule to the end of top or bottom hemisphere.  
	 	This cannot be less than CapsuleRadius.

Variables.Name: CapsuleRadius
Variables.Description:
Radius of cap hemispheres and center cylinder. 
	 	This cannot be more than CapsuleHalfHeight.

Functions.Name: SetCapsuleSize
Functions.Description: Change the capsule size. This is the unscaled size, before component scale is applied.

Params.Name: InRadius
Params.Description: : radius of end-cap hemispheres and center cylinder.

Params.Name: InHalfHeight
Params.Description: : half-height, from capsule center to end of top or bottom hemisphere.

Functions.Name: SetCapsuleRadius
Functions.Description:
Set the capsule radius. This is the unscaled radius, before component scale is applied.
	  If this capsule collides, updates touching array for owner actor.

Params.Name: Radius
Params.Description: : radius of end-cap hemispheres and center cylinder.

Functions.Name: SetCapsuleHalfHeight
Functions.Description:
Set the capsule half-height. This is the unscaled half-height, before component scale is applied.
	  If this capsule collides, updates touching array for owner actor.

Params.Name: HalfHeight
Params.Description: : half-height, from capsule center to end of top or bottom hemisphere.

Functions.Name: GetScaledCapsuleRadius
Functions.Description: Returns the capsule radius scaled by the component scale.

Return.Description: The capsule radius scaled by the component scale.

Functions.Name: GetScaledCapsuleHalfHeight
Functions.Description: Returns the capsule half-height scaled by the component scale. This includes both the cylinder and hemisphere cap.

Return.Description: The capsule half-height scaled by the component scale.

Functions.Name: GetScaledCapsuleHalfHeight_WithoutHemisphere
Functions.Description:
Returns the capsule half-height minus radius (to exclude the hemisphere), scaled by the component scale.
	 From the center of the capsule this is the vertical distance along the straight cylindrical portion to the point just before the curve of top hemisphere begins.

Return.Description: The capsule half-height minus radius, scaled by the component scale.

Functions.Name: GetScaledCapsuleSize
Functions.Description: Returns the capsule radius and half-height scaled by the component scale. Half-height includes the hemisphere end cap.

Params.Name: OutRadius
Params.Description: Radius of the capsule, scaled by the component scale.

Params.Name: OutHalfHeight
Params.Description: Half-height of the capsule, scaled by the component scale. Includes the hemisphere end cap.

Return.Description: The capsule radius and half-height scaled by the component scale.

Functions.Name: GetScaledCapsuleSize_WithoutHemisphere
Functions.Description: Returns the capsule radius and half-height scaled by the component scale. Half-height excludes the hemisphere end cap.

Params.Name: OutRadius
Params.Description: Radius of the capsule, ignoring component scaling.

Params.Name: OutHalfHeightWithoutHemisphere
Params.Description: Half-height of the capsule, scaled by the component scale. Excludes the hemisphere end cap.

Return.Description: The capsule radius and half-height scaled by the component scale.

Functions.Name: GetUnscaledCapsuleRadius
Functions.Description: Returns the capsule radius, ignoring component scaling.

Return.Description: the capsule radius, ignoring component scaling.

Functions.Name: GetUnscaledCapsuleHalfHeight
Functions.Description: Returns the capsule half-height, ignoring component scaling. This includes the hemisphere end cap.

Return.Description: The capsule radius, ignoring component scaling.

Functions.Name: GetUnscaledCapsuleHalfHeight_WithoutHemisphere
Functions.Description:
Returns the capsule half-height minus radius (to exclude the hemisphere), ignoring component scaling. This excludes the hemisphere end cap.
	 From the center of the capsule this is the vertical distance along the straight cylindrical portion to the point just before the curve of top hemisphere begins.

Return.Description: The capsule half-height minus radius, ignoring component scaling.

Functions.Name: GetUnscaledCapsuleSize
Functions.Description: Returns the capsule radius and half-height scaled by the component scale. Half-height includes the hemisphere end cap.

Params.Name: OutRadius
Params.Description: Radius of the capsule, scaled by the component scale.

Params.Name: OutHalfHeight
Params.Description: Half-height of the capsule, scaled by the component scale. Includes the hemisphere end cap.

Return.Description: The capsule radius and half-height scaled by the component scale.

Functions.Name: GetUnscaledCapsuleSize_WithoutHemisphere
Functions.Description: Returns the capsule radius and half-height, ignoring component scaling. Half-height excludes the hemisphere end cap.

Params.Name: OutRadius
Params.Description: Radius of the capsule, ignoring component scaling.

Params.Name: OutHalfHeightWithoutHemisphere
Params.Description: Half-height of the capsule, scaled by the component scale. Excludes the hemisphere end cap.

Return.Description: The capsule radius and half-height (excluding hemisphere end cap), ignoring component scaling.

Functions.Name: GetShapeScale
Functions.Description: Get the scale used by this shape. This is a uniform scale that is the minimum of any non-uniform scaling.

Return.Description: the scale used by this shape.
